MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Aug-09-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Hearing re: PLAINTIFF JUNG LEE'S MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows:

The unopposed Application for Admission of Galen K. Cheney pro hac vice is granted.

Counsel for the plaintiff is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling.

Judge: Rochelle C. East. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Not Reported. Bailiff: Sr. Deputy Malone. (302/RCE)
